prompt: Write a Python script using Biopython and the RCSB PDB REST API that: (1) queries RCSB PDB for all structures with organism 'Bacillus anthracis', (2) retrieves metadata: PDB ID, resolution, title, protein name, UniProt accession, (3) annotates each structure as belonging to one of: protective antigen (PA), lethal factor (LF), edema factor (EF), capsule biosynthesis, spore coat, or other, (4) computes a protein-family coverage summary showing mean resolution and number of structures per family, (5) generates a pie chart of structure counts by family and outputs a CSV of all structures with annotations. Include a note in the output README about the biological significance of each protein family for anthrax pathogenesis research context.
source_citation: Derived from RCSB PDB (2024_10); target: Bacillus anthracis virulence factor structures; organism: Bacillus anthracis; catalogue version v1.0

_provenance.target_class: select agent bacterial protein structures (anthrax toxin components, capsule, spore proteins)
